title: malaxis dolpensis
intro: Malaxis dolpensis, also known as Dolpat orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The leaves and roots of the Dolpat orchid have been traditionally used in herbal preparations to treat these conditions, and it is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits. Herbal preparations of Malaxis dolpensis are typically made by drying and powdering the leaves and roots, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or capsules.
